description_pairs.source_description: Base block component for render HTML block via react. Creates a container for the graph block, correctly places it on the canvas, updates the geometry and z-index when the state changes. By default will hide canvas block automatically when react will render the block, but autoHideCanvas can be set to false with canvasVisible to control visibility manually.
